title: viola × savatieri var. multifida
intro: Viola × savatieri var. multifida, also known as the multifida viola, is a type of hybrid viola plant that is native to the mountainous regions of China. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viola × savatieri var. multifida include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to food products for its flavor and medicinal properties.
